case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. VS. JEFF T DESIGNS

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. SERVED FEB-28-2012, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT DESIGNS, JEFF T PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON APR-04-2012 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
